description: Audit the current web app and produce docs/flutter-migration-map.md listing all screens, endpoints, models, auth assumptions, and feature parity status. Also create the feature branch.
steps: Create and checkout a new git branch named 'flutter-mobile-app' from main.

Create docs/flutter-migration-map.md with the following sections: (1) Executive Summary of the migration scope. (2) Customer Screens mapped from the Next.js app (home, categories, product detail, cart, checkout, dashboard/orders, order tracking with live GPS, account, wallet, loyalty, favorites, addresses, notifications, settings, support). (3) Delivery Partner Screens (login via OTP, main dashboard with stats, active order list, pickup confirmation, damage reporting, collection recording, OTP/slide delivery completion, GPS tracking). (4) API Endpoints table listing every endpoint under /api/ that Flutter will consume, grouped by domain (auth, account, orders, delivery, products, categories, notifications, support), with HTTP method, auth requirement, and brief description. (5) Prisma Models table listing all models relevant to mobile (User, Order, OrderItem, Product, Category, Address, WalletTransaction, LoyaltyAccount, LoyaltyTransaction, PushSubscription, Notification, Favorite, UserSettings, SupportTicket, SupportMessage, DeliveryLocationEvent, DeliveryCollection, DeliveryAdjustment, DeliverySlot, PromoCode, Offer, Banner). (6) Auth Assumptions section documenting the current NextAuth session/JWT approach, how mobile needs bearer token auth instead of cookies, token refresh strategy. (7) Feature Parity Status table with columns: Feature, Web Status, Flutter Target, Notes. (8) Platform Limitations section documenting iOS notification restrictions, Android alarm policies, background location constraints.
Ensure the document references actual file paths from the codebase (e.g., 'see app/api/delivery/poll/route.ts') for traceability.
Commit with message 'docs: add flutter migration map audit document'.
acceptance_criteria: docs/flutter-migration-map.md exists and contains all 8 sections described above
The document references actual API route file paths from the codebase
A new git branch 'flutter-mobile-app' exists with the commit
verification: Run 'git branch' and confirm 'flutter-mobile-app' exists and is checked out
Run 'cat docs/flutter-migration-map.md | wc -l' and confirm it has substantial content (>100 lines)
Run 'npm run build' to confirm existing app still builds
findings: Branch flutter-mobile-app created from main. docs/flutter-migration-map.md created with 381 lines covering all 8 required sections. npm run build succeeds. prisma validate requires .env with DATABASE_URL set (created .env from .env.example). Product browsing for customers is currently server-rendered (no public API endpoint yet) - noted in the migration map.
